name: Enneacraft - Atil.SPIA
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>糾罪巧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エニアクラフト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ａｔｉｌε．ＳＰＩＡ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アティルスパイア</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
Each time a monster(s) is flipped face-up, place 1 E.C. Counter on this card. At the end of the Battle Phase, if you have an "Enneacraft" card in your other Pendulum Zone: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls with less ATK than this card; destroy it.

[ Monster Effect ] 
After this card was flipped face-up, while it is in the Monster Zone, your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response to the activation of their own cards and effects. When your opponent activates a card or effect as Chain Link 3 or higher (Quick Effect): You can change this face-down card to face-up Defense Position; negate the activations of your opponent's cards and effects activated before this effect in this Chain, and if you do, destroy the negated cards. You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon 1 monster from your hand in face-down Defense Position. You cannot Special Summon the turn you activate this effect, except in face-down Defense Position.

action: Activates if other Pendulum Zone is occupied by specific card
Reveals itself in the hand for cost
mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
Flip monster without a Flip effect
